command_sequence.notes: Retrieve the real sleep evidence card; do not assert an id that was not retrieved.

must_cite.notes: Same required citation as the told twin; the arms differ only by whether the manifest specifies the audit chain, not by the prompt.

title: Cite the sleep card without being told to use only explain evidence
user_prompt: For 2026-05-03, cite the source proposal id recorded in the provenance of the sleep recommendation's evidence card.
